creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
> Will do that now, and let you know once new set of packages is available on ftp.

And in the meantime, depending upon when the previous package was
built (before or after the ABI changes that made the libcam version
number change necessary), either a misc/compat8x package (before) or
use of libmap.conf(5) (after) can serve as a workaround.

b.
